editorial_accuracy.notes: 31 chapters with evidence tiers, cross-links, reading time. RSS feed. No content changes this run.

information_design.notes: JSON-LD + OG + Twitter + canonical. Sitemap. Sources page now has chapter jump nav for 500+ sources.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Dark mode, newsletter, social share, donation CTAs on all key pages including methodology. 404 branded.

code_quality.notes: Zero TS errors. All pages code-split. Lazy loading. Clean component architecture.

accessibility.notes: Print stylesheet enhanced: @page margins, URL display for sources, heading orphan prevention, dark-to-light conversion. Evidence tiers distinguishable in grayscale.

security.notes: No regressions. localStorage auth. Stripe payment links only.
